/usr/bin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libonset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libonset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/onset_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/onset_interfaces/msg/detail/launch_command__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/gong/onset_ws/build/onset_interfaces:/opt/ros/humble/lib: libonset_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/humble/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
